body:
softvelvetmoon:

she says she wants to see me gaming, and picks a horror game she knows i’m so bad at, promising she’d cuddle me and distract me through.

then i realize her mean of distraction is making me strapwarming her while i’m literally having the console in front of my eyes and my face half tilted away from the screen. but she keeps shifting and thrusting every so often and holds me down everytime i jump from the scare. and those praises, purring to the back of my ear, oh they never sound more wicked.

“keep going, yes baby, eyes on the screen. you’re doing well.”

in the end i don’t know if i’m trembling and shrieking from the horror or from her relentless tease that i can’t seem to squirm even just an inch away from.
